revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 1024x512px sprite sheet on a solid #FF00FF chroma-key background with no gradients. Pixel-art game asset, high-resolution 16-bit-plus SNES-style, crisp low-resolution pixels, no antialiasing blur, consistent bright palette, dark one-pixel outline where useful, top-left light.

Use the attached reference image only as the identity reference for the character Mito: same proportions, head-to-body ratio, sturdy grounded build, head size, body width, limb thickness, black short hair with tiny low ponytail, vermilion braided-cord ornament, calm amber eyes, indigo haori, white sleeves, young-leaf-green hakama, dark leggings with red ties, sandals, vermilion sash/tassels, pale-green magatama necklace, and white ritual scabbard at left hip. Re-pose the referenced character; do not redesign or resize the character. The sword must remain sheathed at the left hip in every frame, never held in hand.

Exact layout: 4 columns x 2 rows, 8 equal cells, each cell 256x256px. Top row frames 1-4 left to right, bottom row frames 5-8 left to right. Do not draw visible grid lines, separators, borders, labels, frame numbers, text, watermarks, logos, UI, or any markings other than the character. Exactly one character per cell, centered, same scale, same body height, same head height, clear solid magenta margin on all four sides. All drawn pixels must belong to the single character in that cell; no detached fragments, dust specks, seam slivers, leftover effects, or isolated pixel islands.

Animation: 8-frame walk cycle for one direction only, facing DOWN toward the viewer in top-down 3/4 view, face visible. Classic grounded 4-beat cycle with additional weight frames:
Frame 1: CONTACT A, character's LEFT foot planted forward, right foot back, left-foot lead clearly readable, arms counter-swing.
Frame 2: weight drop from frame 1, body 2-3 pixels lower, feet still grounded, arms and legs change together.
Frame 3: PASSING, feet together under body, body at mid height.
Frame 4: push-off, body 2-3 pixels higher, readable leg silhouette change.
Frame 5: CONTACT B, character's RIGHT foot planted forward, left foot back, mirror step of frame 1, arms counter-swing.
Frame 6: weight drop from frame 5, body 2-3 pixels lower.
Frame 7: PASSING, feet together under body.
Frame 8: push-off, body 2-3 pixels higher.

Walk realism constraints: planted foot flat on implied ground directly under body weight; no floating, no tip-toeing, no sliding. Legs visibly differ between consecutive frames. Forward foot alternates left lead in frame 1 and right lead in frame 5. Arms swing opposite to legs; arms and legs both change every frame. Haori hem, vermilion sash tassel, and cords sway naturally. Both feet readable in every frame. Feet share a consistent ground line across all frames while body height shifts subtly by pose.

Character details: Mito is an androgynous 15-year-old mythical-Japan action RPG wanderer, not samurai and not ninja. White tube-sleeved top, short indigo-blue haori jacket with small vermilion braided-cord knots on sleeves and hem, loose young-leaf-green hakama trousers tucked into dark leggings with red cord ties, light travel sandals, vermilion braided belt-sash with small tassel, necklace with three pale-green magatama beads. White sheathed short ritual sword at left hip, wrapped with thin sacred rope and tiny white paper streamers, reads as festival ritual implement rather than katana.

Avoid: any Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, Sakuna character/logo/likeness; samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, gun, modern objects, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, bird or companion creature, letter emblems, modern text, watermark, UI. Output only the sprite sheet image.
